common.name: Name
common.errorTryAgain: An error occurred. Please try again.
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to access the admin dashboard
auth.passkeyFailedConfig: PassKey authentication failed. Please check your configuration.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Please log in again.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions.
auth.resetEmailSent: Password reset instructions have been sent to your email.
auth.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.unableToProcess: Unable to process your request. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Create a new password for your account.
auth.passwordHint: Must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
auth.invalidToken: Invalid or missing reset token. Please request a new password reset link.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
auth.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again or request a new reset link.
auth.changePasswordDescription: Enter your current password and choose a new one

nav.aboutDescription: Open-source video review and approval platform for creative professionals.

projects.createDescription: Set up a new video project for your client
projects.descriptionPlaceholderShort: e.g., Marketing video for Q4 campaign
projects.reminderHint: Sends a notification reminder before the due date
projects.requireAuthDescription: Clients must authenticate to view and approve.
projects.requireAuthDescriptionLong: Secure by default. Clients must authenticate (password, email OTP, or both) to view and approve the project.
projects.passwordDescription: Clients must enter a password to access
projects.passwordDescriptionLong: Clients must enter a password to access the project
projects.otpDescription: Clients receive a one-time code via email
projects.otpDescriptionLong: Clients receive a one-time code via email (must be a registered recipient)
projects.bothDescription: Clients can choose password or email OTP
projects.bothDescriptionLong: Clients can choose between password or email OTP authentication
projects.considerOtpLong: You've provided a client email. Email OTP provides seamless authentication without sharing passwords.
projects.configureSMTP: Configure SMTP in Settings for OTP options
projects.configureSMTPLong: Configure SMTP in Settings to enable OTP authentication options
projects.enterClientEmail: Enter a client email address above to use OTP authentication
projects.savePasswordWarning: Important: Save this password to share with your client.
projects.savePasswordWarningLong: Important: Save this password! You'll need to share it with your client so they can view and approve the project.
projects.noAuthWarning: Anyone with the link can view and approve without authentication.
projects.noAuthWarningLong: Without authentication, anyone with the share link can view and approve your project. Not recommended for sensitive content.
projects.shareOnlyDescription: Pre-approved project for simple video sharing. Disables feedback.
projects.shareOnlyLong: Create an approved project for simple video sharing. Disables feedback and revision tracking.
projects.additionalOptions: Additional options can be configured in Project Settings after creation.
projects.additionalOptionsLong: Note: Additional options like revision tracking, comment restrictions, and feedback settings can be configured after project creation in Project Settings.
projects.passwordRequired: Password is required for password authentication mode
projects.smtpNotConfigured: SMTP not configured. Please configure email settings in Settings.
projects.noRecipientsEmail: No recipients with email addresses configured. Please add at least one recipient with an email in Settings.
projects.configureSMTPToEnable: Configure SMTP in Settings to enable email notifications
projects.addRecipientWithEmail: Add at least one recipient with an email address in Settings
projects.passwordSentSeparate: The password will be sent in a separate email for enhanced security.
projects.passwordNotIncluded: The password will NOT be included in the email - you must share it separately.
projects.notifyAllVideos: This will send an email to the client with access to all ready videos in this project.
projects.notifySpecificVideo: This will send an email to the client with a link to view the selected video version.
projects.confirmApproveProject: Are you sure you want to approve this project?
projects.approveFirst: Approve one version of each video first
projects.approveFirstLong: Approve one version of each video to enable project approval
projects.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this project? The share link will become inaccessible to clients.
projects.unarchiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to unarchive this project?
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This will permanently delete all videos and files. This action cannot be undone.
projects.deleteLastWarning: This is your last warning. Delete permanently?
projects.clientSharePageDescription: Control client access, downloads, and approval permissions
projects.noVideosReadyForReview: No videos are ready for review yet.
projects.projectDetailsDescription: Basic project information and client details
projects.titleHint: The name of this project as shown to clients and in the admin panel
projects.descriptionHint: Optional description to help identify and organize this project
projects.customLinkDescription: Use a custom share link instead of auto-generated from project title
projects.customSlugHint: Custom share link. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed.
projects.autoSlugHint: Auto-generated from project title. Enable "Custom Link" to set your own.
projects.enableRevisionTrackingDescription: Track and limit the number of video revisions
projects.maxRevisionsHint: Must be at least 1. Applies to each video group independently.
projects.maxRevisionsMinError: Maximum revisions must be at least 1
projects.dueDateHint: Optional deadline for this project. Shown on the calendar view.
projects.clientInfoNotificationsDescription: Manage client company, recipients and notification settings
projects.companyBrandNameHint: Start typing to search your client directory or enter a custom company name
projects.clientNotificationScheduleDescription: Configure when clients receive summaries of your replies for this project. Note: Approval emails are always sent immediately.
projects.allowClientApprovalDescription: Allow clients to approve videos. When disabled, only admins can approve videos.
projects.allowAssetDownloadsDescription: Allow clients to download project assets when the video is approved
projects.allowClientFileAttachmentsDescription: Allow clients to attach files (images, documents, audio) to their comments
projects.usePreviewForApprovedDescription: After approval, play the browser-compatible preview instead of the original file. Useful when originals use codecs browsers cannot play (ProRes, PCM audio). Downloads always provide the original file.
projects.cleanPreviewHint: A clean preview without watermarks will be generated when videos are approved.
projects.hideFeedbackSectionDescription: Completely hide the Feedback & Discussion window from clients
projects.restrictCommentsLatestDescription: Only allow feedback on the most recent video version
projects.commentTimestampDisplayHint: Controls how timestamps appear in comment badges on the share page.
projects.videoProcessingDescription: Configure how videos are processed and displayed
projects.previewResolutionHint: Higher resolutions take longer to process and use more storage. Vertical videos automatically adjust dimensions while maintaining aspect ratio.
projects.watermarkDefaultHint: Leave empty to use default format: PREVIEW-{title}-[version]
projects.watermarkAllowedChars: Only letters, numbers, spaces, and these characters: - _ . ( )
projects.securityDescription: Password protection for the share page
projects.noAuthDescription: Anyone with the share link can access the project
projects.addRecipientForOtp: Add at least one recipient with an email address to enable OTP authentication options
projects.noAuthWarningGuest: Without authentication, anyone with the share link can access your project. Guest mode limits access to videos only.
projects.noAuthWarningFull: Without authentication, anyone with the share link can access your project. Full access allows comments and approvals from anyone.
projects.guestModeDescription: Limit access to videos only (no comments, approval, or project details)
projects.guestModeRecommendation: Enable Guest Mode for better security. Without it, anyone with the link can comment and approve videos.
projects.guestModeRecommendedWarning: Guest mode is recommended with no authentication to prevent unauthorized comments and approvals.
projects.restrictToLatestVersionDescription: Guests can only view the latest version of each video
projects.sharePagePasswordHint: Clients will need this password to access the share page
projects.otpRequiresSMTP: OTP authentication requires SMTP to be configured
projects.otpRequiresRecipients: OTP authentication requires at least one recipient with an email address

videos.confirmUnapproveVideo: Are you sure you want to unapprove this video?
videos.confirmApproveVideo: Are you sure you want to approve this video?
videos.versionLabelWarning: Version labels appear in watermarks. The change will only apply to newly uploaded videos.
videos.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this video?
videos.frameSteppingHint: Frame stepping pauses the video automatically. Speed range: 0.25x - 2.0x
videos.versionLabelPlaceholder: Leave empty for auto-generated label (v1, v2, etc.)
videos.versionLabelHint: Leave version label empty to auto-generate (v1, v2, v3...)
videos.dragDropOrClick: Drag & Drop or Click to Choose
videos.uploadInfo: Upload the original file without watermark. Preview versions will be generated automatically. Upload can be paused and resumed if interrupted.
videos.fileTooSmall: File is too small to be a valid video
videos.invalidVideo: File does not appear to be a valid MP4/MOV video. Please ensure you are uploading an unencrypted, standard MP4 video file.
videos.invalidVideoShort: File does not appear to be a valid MP4/MOV video.
videos.failedToRead: Failed to read file. Please try again.
videos.uploadExpired: Upload session expired. Please try again.
videos.dropVideosOrBrowse: Drop videos here or click to browse
videos.selectFilesHint: Select files above to add them to the upload queue. You can upload up to
videos.noAdditionalAssets: No additional assets available for this video
videos.deleteAssetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
videos.removeThumbnailConfirm: Remove as the video thumbnail? The system-generated thumbnail will be used instead.
videos.noOtherVersions: No other versions available. Create a new version first.
videos.copiedSuccessfully: Successfully copied {count} asset(s) to the selected version
videos.downloadApprovedOnly: Download is only available for approved projects
videos.videoInfoDescription: Project details and original file specifications
videos.confirmApprovalDescription: Confirm approval for this video version
videos.approvalDownloadHint: Once approved, the original quality video will be available for download.

comments.approvedDownloadReady: The final version is ready for download without watermarks.
comments.versionApprovedDownload: {versionLabel} of this video has been approved and is ready for download.
comments.aVersionApprovedDownload: A version of this video has been approved and is ready for download.
comments.restrictedToLatest: You can only leave feedback on the latest version. Please switch to version
comments.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
comments.enterToSend: Press Enter to send & Shift+Enter for new line
comments.selectNameFirst: Please select your name from the dropdown above before sending
comments.dragDropFiles: Drag & drop files here or click to browse
comments.supportedFileTypes: Images, audio, video, documents, subtitles, project files, and archives

share.passwordPrompt: Please enter the password to continue.
share.otpPrompt: Enter your email to receive an access code.
share.recipientsOnly: This authentication is for project recipients only.
share.codePrompt: If a recipient exists with {email}, you will receive a verification code shortly.
share.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
share.failedToSendCode: Failed to send code. Please try again.
share.noVideosReady: No videos are ready for review yet. Please check back later.
share.linkInvalid: This share link is invalid or has expired.
share.contactSharer: Please contact the person who shared it with you.
share.videoInfoDescription: Project details and original file specifications
share.approveVideoDescription: Confirm approval for this video version
share.approveConsequence: Once approved, the original quality video will be available for download.
share.downloadNotAvailable: Download is only available for approved projects

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.failedToRemoveIP: Failed to remove IP from blocklist
settings.failedToRemoveDomain: Failed to remove domain from blocklist
settings.fillSmtpFields: Please fill in all SMTP fields before testing
settings.testEmailSuccess: Test email sent successfully! Check your inbox.

appearance.title: Branding & Appearance
appearance.description: Configure company identity, domain, theme, accent colors, and email templates
appearance.companyNameHint: Displayed in email notifications and throughout the application
appearance.logoHint: Upload an SVG up to 300 KB. Appears in app screens and emails. Favicons stay unchanged.
appearance.appDomainHint: Include protocol (https://) and no trailing slash. Used for generating share links.
appearance.themeToggleHint: Users can still toggle the theme using the button in the header.
appearance.accentColorHint: Choose an accent color for buttons, links, and highlights throughout the application.

language.title: Language
language.description: Set the application language for all users
language.label: Application Language
language.hint: This changes the language for all admin pages, client-facing pages, and email notifications. A page reload is required after changing.

email.title: Email / SMTP
email.description: Configure SMTP settings and notification schedules
email.starttlsHint: Port 587 recommended. Most secure option for modern email providers.
email.tlsHint: Port 465 recommended. Legacy secure connection method.
email.noEncryptionHint: Port 25 or custom. Not recommended - credentials sent unencrypted.
email.smtpPasswordHint: For iCloud or Gmail, use an App Specific Password. For other providers, use your SMTP password.
email.testConfigHint: Test your email configuration with the current form values before saving. This helps ensure your settings are correct.
email.adminScheduleHint: Configure when you receive summaries of client comments across all projects. Note: Approval emails are always sent immediately.
email.fillAllFields: Please fill in all SMTP fields before testing
email.testSuccess: Test email sent successfully! Check your inbox.

emailTemplates.headerBrandingHint: Choose what to display in the email header
emailTemplates.title: Email Templates
emailTemplates.subject: Subject:
emailTemplates.placeholdersHint: Click to copy. Use in subject or body.
emailTemplates.resetConfirm: Reset this template to the default? Your customizations will be lost.

templateDescriptions.NEW_VERSION: Sent to clients when a new version is uploaded
templateDescriptions.PROJECT_APPROVED: Sent to clients when a project or deliverable is approved
templateDescriptions.COMMENT_NOTIFICATION: Sent to clients when admin leaves a comment on a project
templateDescriptions.ADMIN_COMMENT_NOTIFICATION: Sent to admins when a client leaves a comment
templateDescriptions.ADMIN_PROJECT_APPROVED: Sent to admins when a client approves a project or deliverable
templateDescriptions.PROJECT_GENERAL: Sent to clients when deliverables are ready for review
templateDescriptions.PASSWORD: Sends the access password in a separate email for security
templateDescriptions.PASSWORD_RESET: Sent to admins when they request a password reset
templateDescriptions.DUE_DATE_REMINDER: Sent to admins when a project deadline is approaching

placeholderDescriptions.PASSWORD_NOTICE: Password protection notice (shown only if protected)
placeholderDescriptions.EXPIRY_TIME: How long the link is valid
placeholderDescriptions.REMINDER_TYPE: When the project is due (e.g., tomorrow, in 7 days)

notifications.title: Email & Push Notifications
notifications.description: Configure email and push notification destinations
notifications.emailDescription: SMTP configuration, test email, and admin summary schedule.
notifications.pushDescription: Send push notifications to Gotify, ntfy, Pushover, or Telegram.
notifications.browserPushDescription: Receive push notifications directly in your browser. Works across all your devices.

videoProcessing.title: Default Project Settings
videoProcessing.description: Defaults applied when creating new projects
videoProcessing.resolutionHint: New projects will use this resolution by default. Can be overridden per project.
videoProcessing.timestampHint: Used for new projects by default. You can change this per project in Project Settings.
videoProcessing.watermarkHint: Leave empty to use project-specific format. New projects will use this as default.
videoProcessing.watermarkCharsAllowed: Only letters, numbers, spaces, and these characters: - _ . ( )
videoProcessing.usePreviewApprovedHint: After approval, play the browser-compatible preview instead of the original file. Useful when originals use codecs browsers cannot play (ProRes, PCM audio). Downloads always provide the original file.
videoProcessing.cleanPreviewNote: When enabled with watermarks, a clean preview without watermarks will be generated when videos are approved.
videoProcessing.clientAttachmentsHint: Allow clients to attach files (images, documents, audio) to their comments. New projects will use this as default. Can be overridden per project.
videoProcessing.autoApprove: Auto-approve project when all videos are approved
videoProcessing.autoApproveHint: When enabled, the project is marked as APPROVED when all unique videos have at least one approved version.
videoProcessing.autoApproveDisableHint: Disable this if you upload videos one-by-one and don't want the project to auto-approve until you're ready.

security.title: Advanced Security Settings
security.warningDescription: These settings control critical security features including rate limiting, hotlink protection, and access controls. Modifying these values without proper understanding may impact system functionality and security. Only adjust if you are familiar with these security mechanisms.
security.httpsHint: Enable for production deployments. Disable for local development with HTTP.
security.hstsEnabled: HSTS header is enabled, forcing browsers to use HTTPS connections.
security.hotlinkHint: Controls how the system handles hotlinking attempts. Log Only is recommended for monitoring.
security.adminSessionLimitHint: Requests per minute per admin session (default: 600)
security.shareSessionLimitHint: Requests per minute per share session (default: 300)
security.authAttemptsHint: Maximum authentication attempts (password or OTP) before lockout
security.maxUploadSizeHint: Maximum size per upload via TUS (1-100 GB)
security.maxAttachmentsHint: Maximum files per comment attachment batch (1-50, default: 10)
security.adminSessionTimeoutHint: Controls inactivity logout in the admin dashboard. Maximum is 24 hours.
security.shortSecurity: Short - strong security; sessions expire quickly
security.veryLong: Very long - consider the security trade-off
security.clientSessionTimeoutHint: Configure how long client share sessions stay active.
security.leaveBlank: Leave blank to use session timeout
security.shareTokenOverride: Override share JWT expiry (60-86400 seconds). Leave blank to use session timeout above. Default: session timeout.
security.veryShort: Very short - sessions may expire while users are active
security.extended: Extended - long-lived sessions; trusted environments only
security.maximum: Maximum - long-lived sessions; use with caution
security.trackAnalyticsHint: Enable or disable analytics tracking for page visits and downloads
security.trackSecurityLogsHint: Enable or disable security event logging (hotlink attempts, rate limits, suspicious activity)
security.showSecurityDashboardHint: Enable access to /admin/security page to view security events and logs (only visible when enabled)
security.failedToRemoveIP: Failed to remove IP from blocklist
security.failedToRemoveDomain: Failed to remove domain from blocklist

externalNotifications.title: Push Notifications
externalNotifications.description: Configure push notifications to Gotify, ntfy, Pushover, and more
externalNotifications.configureBelow: Configure one or more destinations below.
externalNotifications.gotifyHint: Send notifications to a self-hosted Gotify server.
externalNotifications.ntfyHint: Send notifications to an ntfy topic (self-hosted or ntfy.sh).
externalNotifications.telegramHint: Send notifications using a Telegram bot.
externalNotifications.noDestinations: No push notification destinations configured yet.
externalNotifications.failedToLoad: Failed to load push notification destinations

webPush.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
webPush.modernBrowser: A modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari 16+)
webPush.enablePrompt: Enable push notifications for this browser
webPush.enableInstructions: To enable notifications, click the lock icon in your browser's address bar and allow notifications.
webPush.noDevices: No devices subscribed to push notifications.
webPush.getStarted: Enable notifications on this device to get started.
webPush.permissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Please enable notifications in your browser settings.
webPush.enabledSuccess: Push notifications enabled for this device
webPush.disabledSuccess: Push notifications disabled for this device

schedule.title: Notification Schedule
schedule.description: Configure when to receive email notifications
schedule.hourlyHint: Every hour at :00 (10:00, 11:00, etc.). Approvals are always sent immediately.
schedule.dailyHint: Once per day at your chosen time. Approvals are always sent immediately.
schedule.weeklyHint: Once per week on your chosen day. Approvals are always sent immediately.

security.title: Security Events
security.description: Monitor events, rate limits, and suspicious activity
security.deleteEventsDescription: Remove old security events from the database. This action cannot be undone.
security.deleteAllConfirm: Delete ALL security events? This will permanently delete every security event in the system and CANNOT be undone.
security.deleteOlderConfirm: Delete all security events older than {days} days? This cannot be undone.
security.rateLimitsDescription: Currently locked out IPs and accounts due to excessive failed attempts.
security.unblockConfirm: Unblock this rate limit entry? The user/IP will be able to attempt login again.
security.clearAllConfirm: Clear ALL rate limits? This will unblock every locked out user and IP address.
security.failedToClearAll: Failed to clear all rate limits

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.description: Manage who receives project notifications and updates
recipients.searchCompanyContacts: Type to search {count} contact(s) from this company
recipients.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this recipient?
recipients.enterNameOrEmail: Please enter at least a name or email address
recipients.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

reprocess.title: Video Processing Settings Changed
reprocess.description: You've changed settings that affect how videos are processed. These changes will only apply to newly uploaded videos.
reprocess.willRegenerate: will be regenerated with new settings
reprocess.originalsKeptSafe: Old preview files will be deleted (originals are kept safe)
reprocess.temporarilyUnavailable: will be temporarily unavailable during processing
reprocess.usesResources: This uses server CPU and storage resources

unapprove.title: Unapprove Project
unapprove.description: You are about to change the project status from APPROVED back to IN REVIEW.
unapprove.whatToDo: What would you like to do with the approved videos?
unapprove.unapproveAllDescription: Unapprove the project AND all approved videos (removes access to original quality downloads)
unapprove.projectOnlyDescription: Only change project status, keep videos approved (clients retain original quality access)
unapprove.tipDescription: if you need to make changes to the project without affecting client access to approved videos.

device.authorizeDescription: Connect your workflow integration to ViTransfer
device.signInDescription: Authenticate to authorize the workflow integration
device.confirmCode: Confirm the code shown in your workflow integration
device.deviceCodeHint: Enter the code displayed in your workflow integration
device.authCompleteDescription: Your workflow integration is now connected. You can close this window.
device.authFailedDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again from your workflow integration.
device.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

unsubscribe.title: Email Preferences
unsubscribe.invalidLink: This unsubscribe link is missing or invalid. Please use the link from your email.
unsubscribe.success: You're unsubscribed from project email notifications.
unsubscribe.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
unsubscribe.hint: Stops email notifications only. Your share link still works.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

session.logoutCountdown: You will be logged out in {time} due to inactivity.
session.stayLoggedIn: Click anywhere or move your mouse to stay logged in.

clients.title: Client Directory
clients.description: Manage your client companies and contacts
clients.syncTitle: Import existing clients from historical projects
clients.noClientsHint: Add your first client company or import from existing projects
clients.addClientCompanyDescription: Create a new client company in your directory
clients.confirmDeleteCompany: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All contacts for this company will also be deleted.
clients.confirmDeleteContact: Are you sure you want to delete contact "{name}"?
clients.contactLanguageHint: Used for email notifications to this contact. Leave as default to use the system language.

users.title: User Management
users.noUsersHint: Add your first admin user to get started
users.changePasswordDescription: Enter your current password and choose a new one
users.passkeysInfo: Passkeys allow passwordless login using biometrics or security keys.
users.noPasskeysHint: Add a passkey for passwordless login
users.passkeysOwnAccountOnly: Users can only add passkeys to their own account
users.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete user "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.failedToRegisterPasskeyConfig: Failed to register PassKey. Please check your configuration.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noProjectsDue: No projects due on this day
calendar.subscriptionHint: Subscribe to this URL in your calendar app (Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar) to see project due dates.

common.questionsFooter: Questions? Simply reply to this email.
common.protectedProjectNotice: Use the password sent separately to access this project.
common.unsubscribeNotice: Stops email notifications only. Your share link still works.
common.automatedSecurityMessage: This is an automated security message from {{COMPANY_NAME}}

newVersion.title: New Version Available
newVersion.subtitle: Ready for your review
newVersion.subject: New Version Available: {{PROJECT_TITLE}}
newVersion.body: A new version of {{VIDEO_NAME}} ({{VERSION_LABEL}}) is ready for your review in {{PROJECT_TITLE}}.

projectApproved.subtitleComplete: All deliverables are approved and ready to deliver
projectApproved.downloadNoWatermarks: You can now download the final version without watermarks.
projectApproved.filesReady: The final files are now ready for download.
projectApproved.fileReady: The final file is now ready for download.
projectApproved.subject: {{PROJECT_TITLE}} - Approved and Ready for Download

commentNotification.title: New Comment
commentNotification.subject: New Comment on {{PROJECT_TITLE}}
commentNotification.body: There's a new comment on {{VIDEO_NAME}} {{VERSION_LABEL}} in {{PROJECT_TITLE}}.

password.title: Project Password
password.subject: Access Password: {{PROJECT_TITLE}}
password.body: Use this password to access {{PROJECT_TITLE}}. We send it separately for security.
password.keepConfidential: Keep this password confidential. Pair it with the review link we sent separately.

passwordReset.title: Password Reset
passwordReset.subtitle: Reset your admin account password
passwordReset.subject: Reset Your Password - {{COMPANY_NAME}}
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new one.
passwordReset.sessionsLogout: All sessions will be logged out after reset
passwordReset.ignoreNotice: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

email.passwordNotice: Protected project: Use the password sent separately to access this project.
